job_description:
Performance Marketing Executive

About the Role Orestes is seeking a results-driven Performance Marketing Executive to join our growing e-commerce marketing team. In this role, you will own the end-to-end execution of paid performance campaigns across Meta (Facebook & Instagram Ads) and Google Ads platforms, driving measurable business outcomes including revenue, ROAS, and customer acquisition targets.

Key Responsibilities

Paid Advertising & Campaign Management - Plan, execute, and manage performance campaigns on Meta Ads Manager (Facebook & Instagram) and Google Ads (Search, Display, Shopping, YouTube, Demand Gen) with a clear focus on e-commerce KPIs. - Manage daily/weekly budgets across platforms, ensuring efficient allocation and pacing to maximize performance against spend targets. - Set up and manage Google Shopping / Performance Max campaigns for product catalog advertising and drive incremental e-commerce revenue.

ROI Tracking & Performance Optimization - Continuously monitor and optimize campaign performance against targets including ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPL, revenue, and conversion rate to ensure ROI-positive outcomes. - Analyze funnel performance data and identify drop-off points; work cross-functionally with product and CRO teams to improve conversion rates. - Generate weekly and monthly performance reports with actionable insights, presenting findings and recommendations to the marketing leadership team.

Creative Collaboration & Experimentation - Brief the creative team on ad formats, messaging angles, and visual requirements based on performance data and platform best practices. - Review ad creatives critically for platform compliance, brand consistency, and expected performance; provide data-backed feedback for iteration. - Coordinate with the content and SEO teams to align paid and organic strategies for maximum brand visibility and cost efficiency.

Required Qualifications

  • 2–3 years of hands-on, end-to-end experience managing paid performance campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads in an e-commerce or D2C environment.
  • Proven track record of managing significant monthly ad spends (INR 5L+ or equivalent) with demonstrable ROAS and revenue impact.
  • Deep knowledge of Google Ads ecosystem — Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, Performance Max, and Smart campaigns.
  • Strong proficiency in Meta Ads Manager — campaign structures, audience building, creative testing, Advantage+ campaigns, and catalog/dynamic ads.
  • Hands-on experience with conversion tracking using Meta Pixel, Google Ads conversion tracking, Google Tag Manager, and GA4.
  • Ability to independently read, interpret, and act on campaign data without requiring hand-holding — strong analytical mindset.
  • Solid understanding of e-commerce metrics: ROAS, CAC, LTV, AOV, MER, and their interplay with marketing strategy.
  • Experience with A/B testing frameworks and the discipline to draw statistically sound conclusions from experiments.
  • Familiarity with retargeting strategies, dynamic product ads (DPA), and full-funnel campaign architecture.
  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).

Contact Information

  • Email: aswathy@orestestech.com
  • Phone: 8089671177
  • Application Instruction: Share your updated resume to aswathy@orestestech.com if this opportunity aligns with your career goals.

Junior DevOps Engineer - (Exp: 0.5-3 Yrs)

Closing Date: 21 June 2026 Job Published: 07 May 2026 Contact Email: careers@reizend.ai

Brief Description - Experience Required: 0.5 - 3 years - CTC: 4-6 LPA - Location: Trivandrum - Work Mode: Work From Office

We are seeking a motivated and proactive Junior DevOps Engineer to support and enhance our cloud-native infrastructure and DevOps practices. This role involves working with modern cloud platforms, containerized environments, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring systems to ensure high availability, scalability, and reliability of applications. The ideal candidate should be hands-on, eager to learn, collaborative, and passionate about automation, cloud technologies, and system reliability.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in building, deploying, and maintaining cloud infrastructure and containerized applications.
  • Work with AWS services (Fargate, ECS, DynamoDB, SNS, etc.) for managing distributed systems.
  • Monitor system performance using CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Splunk, and respond to alerts.
  • Support CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and ArgoCD.
  • Troubleshoot issues across infrastructure, networking, containers, and applications.
  • Assist in configuring and managing Kubernetes clusters, including deployments, services, and ingress.
  • Work on networking components such as load balancers, API gateways, reverse proxies, and service communication.
  • Participate in incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and postmortems.
  • Automate repetitive tasks using scripts and tools to improve efficiency.
  • Maintain documentation for infrastructure, deployments, and troubleshooting processes.
  • Collaborate with development and operations teams to improve system reliability and deployment workflows.
  • Participate in on-call or shift rotations to ensure system availability.

Preferred Skills

Cloud Platforms and Services

  • Basic to intermediate knowledge of AWS services such as ECS, Fargate, DynamoDB, SNS.
  • Basic to intermediate knowledge of GCP services such as GKE, GAR, CloudSQL, Cloud Run.
  • Understanding of cloud-native architectures and distributed systems.
  • Familiarity with infrastructure provisioning concepts (Terraform/CloudFormation is a plus).

Monitoring and Logging Tools

  • Knowledge of CloudWatch Logs, Loki, Splunk for log analysis.
  • Familiarity with Prometheus and Grafana for metrics monitoring and dashboarding.
  • Understanding of alerting systems (Alertmanager) and incident response workflows.
  • Ability to analyze logs and metrics to identify system issues.

Networking and Security

  • Strong understanding of load balancers (e.g., ALB, NLB) for distributing traffic and troubleshooting connectivity issues.
  • Knowledge in API Gateways like AWS API Gateway or NGINX for managing API traffic.
  • Knowledge of reverse proxies and ingress controllers (e.g., NGINX Ingress, Traefik) for managing internal/external traffic.
  • Understanding service-to-service communications, including DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, and gRPC protocols.
  • Experience or hands-on knowledge with firewalls, security groups, and IAM roles for secure communications.
  • Troubleshooting skills for VM-related issues in platforms like AWS EC2 or equivalent.

DevOps Toolchains

  • Proficiency with Docker for managing container images and runtime debugging.
  • Strong understanding of Kubernetes concepts of managing deployments, ingress setups, and pod-related issues and related troubleshooting commands and mechanisms.
  • Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline building tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD for building, deploying, and managing automated pipelines.
  • Understanding of Ingress controllers (e.g., NGINX, Traefik) and SSL termination for secure routing.

Troubleshooting and Incident Management

  • Strong problem-solving skills to identify root causes using logs, metrics, and system-level debugging.
  • Ability to document detailed troubleshooting steps and solutions for recurring issues.

Collaboration and Communication

  • Ability to work with cross-functional teams (DevOps, development, and operations) to resolve incidents.
  • Skills in effective and proactive communication to escalate issues and provide updates during shift handovers.
  • Proficiency with tools like Slack, JIRA, Confluence, or Google Workspace for collaboration and issue tracking.
summary: Junior DevOps Engineer with 0.5-3 years experience needed to manage cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring tools in Trivandrum. Requires AWS, Kubernetes, and Jenkins proficiency.

About Lean Transition Solutions (LTS)

LTS is a global Operational Excellence and Lean Industry 4.0 software company headquartered in the UK. For over a decade, we’ve helped large organizations turn strategy into action by combining Lean thinking, leadership principles, and modern, scalable technology. We are proud to be trusted by leading global organizations, supporting them in building sustainable, people-centric transformation at scale. With teams across India, Europe, the US, the Middle East, and Mexico, we operate as one connected global team. At LTS, we believe technology strengthens people, enabling them to do their best work. That belief shapes our products, our culture, and how we work together.

Role Overview

We are seeking a driven Business Development Executive (Fresher) to join our commercial team and work closely with the Directors to grow our customer base for the wider LTS product suite. This hands-on role combines pipeline management, customer engagement, and sales support. You will be the engine room of our commercial operations—owning outreach, coordinating meetings, maintaining CRM discipline, and supporting the Directors through the full sales cycle from first contact to signed agreement. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on customer interaction, has strong organizational skills, and wants to grow their commercial career in a fast-paced SaaS environment.

Location: Technopark Phase 1, Trivandrum Experience: Fresher

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in identifying potential markets and business opportunities for our software services.

  • Assist in preparing marketing and sales materials (presentations, proposals, case studies).
  • Collaborate with sales and delivery teams to support new client onboarding.
  • Schedule and coordinate meetings and follow-ups with potential clients via email and phone.
  • Update client information and sales progress in the CRM system.
  • Support sales strategies to increase the company’s customer base.
  • Participate in brainstorming sessions and assist in developing new marketing initiatives.
  • Stay informed about product updates and market trends to communicate offerings effectively.

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

  • Meaningful Work with Global Impact: Contribute to enterprise platforms used by world-class organizations like Philips, Hitachi, and Pfizer.
  • People-First, Collaborative Culture: Your ideas are heard, your work is valued, and you’re supported by a team built on trust and respect.

  • Global Exposure, Human Connection: Work with diverse teams and enterprise clients worldwide—while feeling connected and supported.

Build a Strong Future Together

At LTS, we build long-term relationships to create a sustainable future for our people, clients, and organization. We support continuous learning, career development, and meaningful ownership in your work. Our culture values balance, trust, and long-term success.
